articles.title: Katie Boulter Teams Up with Tennis Legend Venus Williams in Madrid
articles.summary: Katie Boulter played doubles with Venus Williams, who she calls an 'absolute icon.' They won their first match together!

articles.title: Carlos Alcaraz Will Miss the French Open Due to Wrist Injury
articles.summary: Two-time defending champion Carlos Alcaraz won't play at the French Open because of a wrist injury. He's sad but says he'll come back stronger.

articles.title: Coco Gauff Wins in Madrid While Battling a Stomach Virus
articles.summary: Coco Gauff threw up during her match but still won! She beat Sorana Cirstea 4-6, 7-5, 6-1 to reach the last 16 in Madrid.
